ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speech recognition model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "mean_trans_edits_rate" REAL /* Mean transcription edit rate */,
  "mean_trans_error_rate" REAL /* Mean transcription error rate */,
  "mean_phon_edits_rate" REAL /* Mean phoneme edit rate */,
  "mean_phon_error_rate" REAL /* Mean phoneme error rate */,
  "mean_syll_edits_rate" REAL /* Mean syllable edit rate */,
  "mean_syll_error_rate" REAL /* Mean syllable error rate */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used to generate the performance metrics */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  "evaluation_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "trained_on_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training */,
  "evaluation_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "training_parameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used during model training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_evaluation_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_trained_on_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("trained_on_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the updated model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each performance metric entry
Reference to the speech recognition model
Reference to the dataset used for evaluation
Timestamp of when the metric was recorded
Version of the model used to generate the performance metrics
Date when the performance metrics were evaluated
Environment in which the performance metrics were evaluated

Timestamp of when the dataset was created
Timestamp of when the user account was created

Date when the update was made
